ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "usubjid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "siteid" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the participant is enrolled */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the participant */,
  "arm" TEXT /* Treatment arm assigned to the participant */,
  "rfstdtc" TEXT /* Date of first study treatment */,
  "saffl" TEXT /* Indicates if the participant is affiliated with the study (Y/N) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the participant */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the participant */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant gave consent */,
  "consent_version" TEXT /* Version of the consent form signed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usubjid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_siteid FOREIGN KEY ("siteid") REFERENCES sites ("siteid")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "siteid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the site */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the site is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the site is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the site is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("siteid")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event */,
  "usubjid" TEXT /* Reference to the participant */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the event (e.g., Adverse Events) */,
  "stdt" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "stdy" INTEGER /* Start day of the event */,
  "endt" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "endy" INTEGER /* End day of the event */,
  "seq" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the event */,
  "ongoing" TEXT /* Indicates if the event is ongoing (Y/N) */,
  "tooltip" TEXT /* Additional information or notes about the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the adverse event */,
  "causality" TEXT /* Causality assessment */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the adverse event */,
  "investigator_comment" TEXT /* Comments from the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_usubjid FOREIGN KEY ("usubjid") REFERENCES participants ("usubjid")
)

CREATE TABLE "concomitant_medications" (
  "med_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "usubjid" TEXT /* Reference to the participant */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the medication (e.g., Concomitant Medications) */,
  "stdt" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "stdy" INTEGER /* Start day of the medication */,
  "endt" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "endy" INTEGER /* End day of the medication */,
  "seq" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the medication */,
  "ongoing" TEXT /* Indicates if the medication is ongoing (Y/N) */,
  "tooltip" TEXT /* Additional information or notes about the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("med_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concomitant_medications_usubjid FOREIGN KEY ("usubjid") REFERENCES participants ("usubjid")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "usubjid" TEXT /* Reference to the participant */,
  "stdt" TEXT /* Start date of enrollment */,
  "stdy" INTEGER /* Start day of enrollment */,
  "endt" TEXT /* End date of enrollment */,
  "endy" INTEGER /* End day of enrollment */,
  "seq" INTEGER /* Sequence number of enrollment */,
  "ongoing" TEXT /* Indicates if the enrollment is ongoing (Y/N) */,
  "tooltip" TEXT /* Additional information or notes about the enrollment */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status */,
  "enrollment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for enrollment or withdrawal */,
  "enrollment_site" INTEGER /* Site ID where the participant was enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_usubjid FOREIGN KEY ("usubjid") REFERENCES participants ("usubjid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_enrollment_site FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_site") REFERENCES sites ("siteid")
)

CREATE TABLE "randomization" (
  "randomization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each randomization */,
  "usubjid" TEXT /* Reference to the participant */,
  "stdt" TEXT /* Start date of randomization */,
  "stdy" INTEGER /* Start day of randomization */,
  "endt" TEXT /* End date of randomization */,
  "endy" INTEGER /* End day of randomization */,
  "seq" INTEGER /* Sequence number of randomization */,
  "ongoing" TEXT /* Indicates if the randomization is ongoing (Y/N) */,
  "tooltip" TEXT /* Additional information or notes about the randomization */,
  "randomization_date" TEXT /* Date of randomization */,
  "randomization_site" INTEGER /* Site ID where the participant was randomized */,
  "randomization_reason" TEXT /* Reason for randomization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("randomization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_randomization_randomization_site FOREIGN KEY ("randomization_site") REFERENCES sites ("siteid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_randomization_usubjid FOREIGN KEY ("usubjid") REFERENCES participants ("usubjid")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_completion" (
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study completion */,
  "usubjid" TEXT /* Reference to the participant */,
  "stdt" TEXT /* Start date of study completion */,
  "stdy" INTEGER /* Start day of study completion */,
  "endt" TEXT /* End date of study completion */,
  "endy" INTEGER /* End day of study completion */,
  "seq" INTEGER /* Sequence number of study completion */,
  "ongoing" TEXT /* Indicates if the study completion is ongoing (Y/N) */,
  "tooltip" TEXT /* Additional information or notes about the study completion */,
  "completion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for study completion */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the last follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_completion_usubjid FOREIGN KEY ("usubjid") REFERENCES participants ("usubjid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, site coordinator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" TEXT /* Active status of the user (Y/N) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "usubjid" TEXT /* Reference to the participant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_usubjid FOREIGN KEY ("usubjid") REFERENCES participants ("usubjid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "usubjid" TEXT /* Reference to the participant */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_usubjid FOREIGN KEY ("usubjid") REFERENCES participants ("usubjid")
)
